vibe: The Terminal - Objective, rigid, functional, highly navigable. Inspired by Swiss airport signage. No gradients, just hard lines and crisp typography.

mono.usage: Flight numbers, seat codes, boarding times, prices, terminal numbers

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Grid Borders ('The Technical Look'). Expose the skeleton. High density for admin, generous asymmetry for booking flow.

cards.style: bg-white border border-neutral-200 rounded-sm shadow-none overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
buttons.outline: border border-neutral-200 bg-transparent text-neutral-900 hover:bg-neutral-50 rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-neutral-600 hover:text-neutral-900 hover:bg-neutral-100 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center

seat_map.container: p-8 bg-neutral-50 border border-neutral-200 rounded-sm overflow-x-auto
seat_map.available: w-10 h-10 border-2 border-neutral-300 rounded-t-lg rounded-b-sm bg-white hover:border-blue-500 hover:text-blue-600 transition-all cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center font-mono text-xs text-neutral-500
seat_map.selected: w-10 h-10 border-2 border-blue-600 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-t-lg rounded-b-sm shadow-md flex items-center justify-center font-mono text-xs font-bold
seat_map.occupied: w-10 h-10 border border-neutral-200 bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-400 rounded-t-lg rounded-b-sm cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center font-mono text-xs

flight_card.layout: flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between p-6 border border-neutral-200 bg-white hover:border-neutral-300 transition-colors
flight_card.duration_line: flex-1 border-t-2 border-dashed border-neutral-200 mx-8 relative flex items-center justify-center

inputs.style: bg-white border border-neutral-200 rounded-sm px-4 py-3 text-neutral-900 placeholder:text-neutral-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:border-transparent transition-all w-full

hero_passenger.description: Minimalist Swiss-style poster design of an airplane wing. High contrast geometric aviation art. Use for main landing page hero.
hero_passenger.placement_rules: Right side of the hero section or background with heavy white/glass overlay.

airport_interior.placement_rules: Use for 'About' sections, boarding info cards, or supplementary visual anchors.

sky_texture.description: Aerial view of an airplane wing soaring above clouds.
sky_texture.placement_rules: Use as a subtle banner background for the 'Booking Confirmation' page.

admin_bg.description: Wide interior view of modern architectural design at Madrid Barajas Airport.
admin_bg.placement_rules: Use for the Admin Login screen background with a 60% white overlay.

animations.page_load: fade-in slide-up slightly (framer-motion or plain CSS)
animations.seat_select: scale up slightly to 1.05 and border color change

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g. data-testid='flight-search-submit', data-testid='seat-14A').

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic border radius (rounded-md/lg), stick to rounded-sm or rounded-none to maintain the architectural 'Swiss' theme.
Borders are your primary separation tool, not shadows. Ensure list items, grid cells, and flight rows are separated by 1px border-neutral-200.
The seat selection map must use a clear 2D grid matrix layout with row numbers (1,2,3) and letters (A,B,C) as coordinates.
Implement a 'Control Room' grid for the admin dashboard: highly dense, KPI cards at the top, flight lists underneath, rigid alignment.
For user booking flows, use the bento grid or single column wizard to minimize cognitive load.
NEVER use placeholder images. Rely solely on the media URLs provided in this file.
All headings MUST use the 'Cabinet Grotesk' font if you can import it from a font service, or fallback to a sturdy sans-serif and explicitly set the tracking-tighter.
